description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master, excluding changes to docs and src/byro/locale. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with Python 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8. For each Python version, set up a PostgreSQL database, install system and Python dependencies, run checks and tests, compile locales, and upload coverage to Codecov for Python 3.8.
